subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved maidservant of God! Your letter was received and the news of the organization and progress of the Spiritual Assembly in the German Empire
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه شما رسید و خبر ترقی و تزیین محفل روحانی در اقلیم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @growth of the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings
